ConstructorParams.summary: Initializes an object instance with the supplied values.

ChangesFilespec.summary: Gets or sets the changes filespec.

IncludeFilters.summary: Gets or sets the included file filters.

IncludeMissingTargetFolders.summary: Gets or sets the include missing target folders flag.

Name.summary: Gets or sets the profile name.

SkipFiles.summary: Gets or sets the skipped files.

SkipFoldersFilespec.summary: Gets or sets the skipped folder file.

members.SourceCodeline: Gets or sets the source codeline value.
members.SourceRoot: Gets or sets the source root value.
members.TargetCodeline: Gets or sets the target codeline value.
members.TargetRoot: Gets or sets the target root value.
